notes: Constructed wordplay pack: 5 Homophones + 5 Hidden Words. Rotating away from Anagrams + Before & After (used in wordplay-2026-06-17 and wordplay-2026-06-18) — this run uses Homophones & Soundalikes + a Hidden Words mechanic that has not appeared in any prior wordplay pack (wordplay-001, -2026-06-17, -2026-06-18 all used Anagrams and/or Before & After only).
Homophones verified as genuine soundalikes: knight/night, reign/rain, sole/soul, pear/pair, flour/flower.

Hidden-word carriers verified: 'heard' hides 'ear' (h-EAR-d), 'departed' hides 'art' (dep-ART-ed), 'village' hides 'age' (vill-AGE), 'spinning' hides 'inn' (sp-INN-ing), 'replacement' hides 'ace' (repl-ACE-ment).
All answers distinct from each other and from today's sourced packs (music_performing_arts-draft-2026-06-19 and literature_books-draft-2026-06-19).
Subcategory 'Rhymes & Word Ladders' is unused — Hidden Words uses 'Puns, Quotes & Idioms' as the closest available subcategory.
